title: Circulating-biomarker card (EWSR1-FLI1 ctDNA / fusion-transcript), cited + graded
context: The circulating-biomarker card reports the evidence on EWSR1-FLI1 ctDNA / fusion-transcript detection as a research/monitoring biomarker, with evidence level and uncertainty and no claim of clinical utility for an individual. MEDIUM risk-tier research reference, gated on a TO-BE-SECURED domain reviewer. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Draft the EWSR1-FLI1 ctDNA / fusion-transcript circulating-biomarker card reporting the detection evidence as a research/monitoring biomarker with evidence level and uncertainty, no individual clinical-utility claim, cited, and domain-reviewer sign-off recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: Reports the evidence on EWSR1-FLI1 ctDNA/fusion-transcript detection (e.g., as a research/monitoring biomarker) with evidence level and uncertainty
No claim of clinical utility for an individual; cited; carries the 'research reference - not clinical guidance' frame
Domain-reviewer sign-off recorded (reviewer TO BE SECURED)
